## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link related issues (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component / feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build-storybook` passes
- [ ] A Ladle story was added or updated (`src/stories/`) demonstrating the change
- [ ] New/changed public API is exported from `src/index.ts` and documented with JSDoc
- [ ] Accessibility considered — keyboard nav, focus management, `aria-*`, visible focus
- [ ] Follows the design rules ("v2"): flat hairline surfaces, shadows only on overlays, borderless tinted status, token utilities (no hardcoded hex), light mode only
- [ ] Uses `forwardRef` + `displayName` where a DOM element is rendered, and merges `className` via `cn`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`…)
